uncertain.note: The apparatus around υπομνηματισμοις / ἀποστάτις is cramped and wraps across lines; there may be additional omitted text in the transcript, but exact segmentation is uncertain.
The siglum after επαταξα is small; it looks like Bᵃ rather than B*, but the print is not perfectly sharp.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct but includes one apparatus-merge (οἰκοῦσιν for οἰκοδομοῦσιν), several lexical misreadings, and one captured marginal line number. Apparatus has multiple small transcription issues and at least one likely omission due to line-wrap.
